verify.value: All required fields are present and non-empty.
verify.rule: Ensure all required fields and sections are included in the blueprint.
The mass estimate must be a numeric value and within the expected range for the subsystem.

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets are present in part_tree and geometry_ops.
verify.rule: Each P0 internal_feature_target must have corresponding geometry_ops that reference it.

verify.value: All interfaces have reciprocal connections with neighboring subsystems.
verify.rule: Adjacent interfaces must have matching joint families and clearances with neighboring subsystems.

verify.value: Visible locking washers and torque values are provided for critical joints.
verify.rule: Critical joints must have visible locking/preload evidence and specified torque or preload values.
Include fixture points, thermal zones, and pressure faces for downstream CFD/FEA.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to lack of clear datum references.
risk.mit: Ensure all assembly steps reference clear datum features and include alignment checks.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure if the combustion chamber dummy is over-stressed during handling.
risk.mit: Conduct a stress analysis and ensure the design can handle the specified handling loads.

risk.desc: Risk of incorrect assembly if connectors are not clearly labeled or keyed.
risk.mit: Ensure all connectors are labeled and keyed to prevent mis-mating.

risk.desc: Risk of assembly sequence errors if the order is not clearly defined.
risk.mit: Define a clear assembly sequence with tooling, torque, and datum references.

risk.desc: Risk of poor visibility if the cutaway window and slide rail are not properly designed.
risk.mit: Ensure the cutaway window and slide rail provide clear and unobstructed views.

Connectors for slide_rail are accessible and keyed to prevent mis-mating.

manufacturing_strategy.support: orientation: vertical, inspection: visual and CMM

verification_focus.description: Check for structural integrity of the combustion chamber dummy under static display loads.

Ensure the cutaway window and slide rail allow clear viewing of internal components.
